S.FORM: Sierra leone Itini i 8 30 N, 11 30 W, noAfilika ko Sierra leone. Polong no sekalay i 71,740 sq km "saka 119 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 71,620 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 120 sq km " Polong i 6,018,888 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 56.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 37.50%, malo no roma to a sera 6.30%. siyoto O (((Freetown)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasepat 27 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Ernest Bai Koroma, patirengan a romi'ad i 2007 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 17 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: si…ôrra …ĺ…ôo~un…ô itini i * ** n, ** ** w, no~uafi…ĺika ko~u si…ôrra …ĺ…ôo~un…ô. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra *.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((fr…ô…ôto~uwn)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakas…ôpat ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …ôrn…ôst b~b~vai ko~uro~uma, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Sierra leone Itini i 8 30 N, 11 30 W, noAfilika ko Sierra leone. Polong no sekalay i 71,740 sq km "saka 119 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 71,620 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 120 sq km " Polong i 6,018,888 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 56.20%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 37.50%, malo no roma to a sera 6.30%. siyoto O (((Freetown)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakasepat 27 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Ernest Bai Koroma, patirengan a romi'ad i 2007 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 17 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
